arts.ttl: Newcastle United £1.2bn stadium announcement 'worth the wait' as club chiefs close to decision
arts.sum: Chronicle Live understands that a final decision has not been made on the location of a site away from St James' Park just yet and that the club remain in discussions with Newcastle City Council on their next move. What is now very clear on Tyneside is that an improved capacity and stadium will help generate the funds needed to compete on the field after three barren transfer windows in a row.

arts.ttl: Arsenal were offered 2x Champions League winner but Arteta sees Havertz as better in key area
arts.sum: Arsenal were reportedly offered the signing of Spanish striker Alvaro Morata this January, only for the Gunners to decide not to pursue the move. Morata ended up leaving AC Milan for a loan move to Galatasaray instead, and it seems that Mikel Arteta and his coaching staff had some doubts about this potential deal. arts.ttl: Newcastle and Arsenal meet again on anniversary of epic clash
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Arsenal meet in the Carabao Cup semi-finals this evening with the stakes high at St James’ Park. Eddie Howe’s side have the advantage after a first-leg win in North London. arts.ttl: 8 players ruled out but 'new signing' set to play as Newcastle United vs Arsenal full squads drop
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Arsenal both face major team selection decisions ahead of tonight's huge Carabao Cup clash at St James' Park. That means, when looking at the official Arsenal website, the Gunners have 17 senior players available for selection for the game vs Newcastle.
